principles: Do not create a third Ask implementation in Alpha.
Keep operator Ask and family-safe Ask separate because their users, safety rules, and evidence contracts differ.
Move shared behavior into this contract before copying logic between repos.
Preserve the working Helm and Family paths until a deliberate migration replaces them.

preserve_capabilities: thread list, history, rename, delete, and escalation
model routing for auto, local, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini, and council
internet modes none, web_search, and deep_research
Beacon evidence metadata, source quality, citations, and raw web isolation
deep research report metadata and report export
operator voice input and AT-0 avatar response state
input safety assessment before model calls
child answer filtering after model calls
parent caution levels for medical, legal, and financial prompts
child-safe context with no parent document excerpts
streaming SSE answers with non-stream fallback
family voice input and optional voice reply

allowed_roles: backend API provider for operator Ask
approval, memory, Beacon, and audit provider
status or handoff link to Helm
data API registry used by Beacon or domain modules

migration_rule: Any change that moves Ask behavior across repo boundaries must update this contract and preserve both surface test suites before merge.
